item_type: Armor items, Damage items, Shop items
description: Reduces the damage taken by illusions and enemy heroes with illusions.

attributes.Illusion Reduction: Reduces the damage taken by illusions to 20% of normal.
attributes.Hero Illusion Reduction: Reduces the damage taken by heroes with illusions to 20% of normal.

lore: A weapon forged to counter the overwhelming strength of illusions.
